store-provider-boundary.decision: All higher layers depend on StoreProvider/EmbeddingProvider interfaces instead of direct SQL/ORM calls.
store-provider-boundary.rationale: Keeps storage backend replaceable and contains SQL complexity inside src/store.
implications: Database changes are localized to store implementation files.

effect-v4-service-runtime.decision: Core storage runtime is modeled as Effect v4 services/layers and wrapped by LibSQLStore for Promise-based callers.
effect-v4-service-runtime.rationale: Allows typed effects internally while preserving ergonomic async APIs at integration boundaries.
implications: Effect service composition is required for core data path changes.
External callers can still use async/await against StoreProvider.

workflow-first-ingestion.decision: Markdown ingestion is implemented as a four-step Mastra workflow: parse -> chunk -> embed -> persist.
workflow-first-ingestion.rationale: Step isolation enables validation, idempotency checks, and reusability by both single-page and bulk import paths.
implications: Ingestion behavior changes should be made in workflow steps, not duplicated in tools/scripts.
Bulk and single ingest share identical persistence semantics.

hybrid-search-ranking.decision: Search ranking combines keyword and vector retrieval with RRF fusion, cosine re-score, backlink boost, and multi-layer dedup.
hybrid-search-ranking.rationale: Balances recall with precision while controlling duplicate chunks and preserving compiled_truth coverage.
implications: Ranking changes should preserve dedup + boost ordering invariants.
Store must supply keyword/vector/backlink and optional embedding lookup support.

local-first-sqlite-vector.decision: Primary persistence is local SQLite plus LibSQLVector index, with filesystem-backed DB URLs by default.
local-first-sqlite-vector.rationale: Supports offline/local-first operation while keeping vector search integrated with page/chunk metadata.
implications: Tests use isolated tmp DB paths and dispose lifecycles.
Vector metadata backfill remains required for consistent search result shape.
